sessions.title: Course Introduction
sessions.description: Syllabus, learning objectives, grading, semester schedule, research paradigms, AIS Basket of 11 Premier Journals, and course policies.

sessions.title: Introduction to IS Research
sessions.description: How to write and review IS research papers. Covers Baird (2021), Sarker et al. (2023), and Sun et al. (2025). Also includes the AIS Basket of 11 Premier Journals.

sessions.title: AI in IS Research
sessions.description: The sociotechnical axis, digital objects, and agentic IS artifacts. Covers Sarker et al. (2019), Faulkner & Runde (2019), Baird & Maruping (2021), and Gartner 2026 trends.

sessions.title: Theorizing in IS Research
sessions.description: Elements of theory, types of theory, and new approaches. Covers Whetten (1989), Gregor (2006), Markus & Robey (1988), Burton-Jones (2021), and Raisch & Fomina (2024).
